name: All World Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at All World Pickleball in Woodbury, MN! There are 15 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. Reservations are available.

name: Colby Lake Park
description: Come play pickleball at Colby Lake Park in Woodbury, MN! There are 5 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Dellwood Country Club
description: Dellwood Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dellwood, MN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: District Program Center
description: District Program Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cottage Grove, MN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Registration and pre-purchase of pickleball pass is required. See website   sowashco.ce.eleyo.com
